data.content: Verified shipment on main: queued/in_action alias filtering is present in src/lib/bd.ts and src/lib/backends/beads-backend.ts, regression tests are present, and quality gates passed in an isolated worktree (bun run lint, bunx tsc --noEmit, bun run test, bun run build). main already matched origin/main; git push returned Everything up-to-date.
